product_mismatch.description: Lead wants something Stayful doesn't offer or has a property type outside Stayful's model.

entries.exact_quote: very much hell bent on the guaranteed rent
entries.lesson: Pre-qualify guaranteed rent expectations in first contact. 1-bed properties at lower price points can't generate enough margin for guaranteed rent. Disqualify early.
Stayful manages whole properties only. HMO/shared-room lettings are outside the model. Clarify in first contact.

financial_case_failed.description: The financial case for STL with Stayful did not clear the lead's threshold.

entries.lesson: For unfurnished ABROAD leads, lead with net-of-setup Year 1 vs Year 2 trajectory. Don't let setup cost dominate Year 1 analysis without context.
R2R Manchester — rent + management fees consumed STL income. Pre-qualify R2R margin before meeting. Required: STL yield > rent + mgmt fee + utilities + profit margin.
Developer management bundled at purchase is hard to break. For off-plan purchases with overseas owners, engage before keys and before developer handover conversation.

r2r_structural.description: R2R deal structurally unviable due to rent level.

entries.lesson: R2R Sheffield: £1,000/month rent near-zero margin. R2R viability formula: STL net monthly > rent + utilities + 15% mgmt + desired profit. If not, disqualify before meeting.

competitor_won.description: Lead chose a competitor or indefinitely deferred.

entries.lesson: ABROAD Switzerland lead speaking to two other companies. Refurb delay + active competitor follow-up = lost. For ABROAD leads actively comparing, accelerate the offer and shorten follow-up cycle.

timing_structural.description: Decision timing made Stayful engagement structurally unattractive.

entries.lesson: R2R Newcastle: good deal (£14k/yr profit) abandoned. R2R leads are deadline-sensitive — landlord signing window closes fast. Build deadline urgency from first call.
EX-STL Nottingham on active Airbnb with another manager, property on sale. If sale timeline < 3 months, switching managers has negative ROI for the lead. Don't push.

personal_concerns.description: Lead had personal concerns that blocked conversion.

entries.lesson: Chester 3-bed: tax/business rates concern + personal use flexibility. These are legitimate addressable barriers but require proactive handling. Suggest accountant consultation and clarify calendar blocking for personal use upfront.

Fully furnished Nottingham property — should have converted but contract terms and performance guarantee expectations blocked it. Stayful doesn't offer performance guarantees — this must be positioned as risk-sharing, not liability avoidance.

lost_prevention_rules: Pre-qualify guaranteed rent seekers in first call — especially 1-bed properties
Pre-qualify R2R leads: rent must allow positive margin after all costs
For off-plan PURCH overseas leads, engage before developer handover
For ABROAD leads comparing providers, accelerate offer within 24h
If active sale timeline < 3 months and they have another STL manager, don't push switch
Always surface 'business rates' as a topic for STL-SW leads with existing commercial awareness
Never let personal use flexibility concern go unaddressed — calendar blocking is the answer
